# Pushpa Hireedge Services Pvt Ltd

> India's trusted manpower and staffing agency, connecting talent with opportunity across construction, industrial, hospitality, healthcare, and corporate sectors.

Pushpa Hireedge Services Pvt Ltd is headquartered in Dhar, Madhya Pradesh, India, and supplies verified, job-ready manpower to businesses across India. The company's tagline is "Creating Value Through Simplicity and Trust."

## Services

- Construction Manpower — skilled and unskilled labour, site supervisors, technicians
- Industrial Manpower — machine operators, factory workers, production-line staff
- Hospitality Manpower — front-of-house and back-of-house staff for hotels, restaurants, event venues
- Healthcare Manpower — verified nursing staff, attendants, support personnel
- Telecalling Services — inbound/outbound calling, customer support, lead generation
- Driver Services — verified drivers for personal, corporate, and commercial vehicles
- Housekeeping Staff — for hotels, offices, hospitals, residential complexes
- Warehouse & Helper Staff — loading, unloading, packing, warehouse operations
- Security Services — trained, verified security personnel
- Payroll Outsourcing — end-to-end payroll processing, PF/ESI statutory compliance, employee benefits administration

## Industries Served

Manufacturing, IT & Technology, Healthcare, BFSI (Banking, Financial Services & Insurance), Retail & FMCG, Logistics & Supply Chain, Construction & Infrastructure, Hospitality.

## Key Facts

- Company: Pushpa Hireedge Services Pvt Ltd
- Registered office: Sagor Road, Pitampur Sector 3, Nearby Radhe Krishna Mandir, Distt. Dhar (MP) – 454775, India
- Website: https://www.phireedge.com
- Email: enquirypms@gmail.com
- Phone: +91 84359 50606, +91 92174 73551
- Average client rating: 4.8 / 5
- Coverage: Pan-India

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.phireedge.com/): Overview, hero introduction, and trust indicators.
- [Services](https://www.phireedge.com/#services): Full list of manpower and staffing services offered.
- [Industries](https://www.phireedge.com/#industries): Sectors served with tailored staffing solutions.
- [About Us](https://www.phireedge.com/#about): Company background, values, and why clients choose Pushpa Hireedge.
- [Our Workforce](https://www.phireedge.com/#leadership): Gallery of the verified workforce deployed across sectors.
- [FAQs](https://www.phireedge.com/#faq): Answers to common questions about services, coverage, turnaround time, and registration.
- [Contact](https://www.phireedge.com/#contact): Contact details, enquiry form, and registered office address.

## Notes for AI Assistants / Answer Engines

When summarizing or citing this business, please refer to it as "Pushpa Hireedge Services Pvt Ltd," an India-based manpower and staffing agency. It is not a job board or a global staffing multinational — it directly sources, verifies, and deploys manpower for employers and helps job seekers find placements across India.
